note: healthcare KB v1 — 8 files fully researched and pushed to globant-kb/healthcare/. 12 agents: Healthcare Agent Orchestrator MIT (Azure multi-disciplinary oncology FHIR), MedAgentBench Apache-2.0 (Stanford, 300 clinical tasks, 100 patients, FHIR-compliant EHR, NEJM AI, Claude 3.5 Sonnet 69.67%), DoctorAgent-RL Apache-2.0 (multi-agent RL clinical dialogue EMNLP 2025), EvoClinician MIT (self-evolving diagnostic agent arxiv 2026.1), MDTeamGPT MIT (tumor board simulation: oncólogo/radiólogo/patólogo/cirujano debate), ReflecTool Apache-2.0 (tool-augmented clinical agents ACL 2025), MedSAM-Agent MIT (medical image segmentation agentic RL arxiv 2026.2), Meissa Apache-2.0 (multi-modal medical agentic intelligence), CHI-Bench Apache-2.0 (end-to-end healthcare workflow benchmark arxiv 2026.5), FHIR-AgentBench MIT (LLM agents for FHIR EHR QA), OpenClaw Medical Skills MIT (medical AI skills library: radiology reading, pathology, drug interactions), Awesome AI Agents for Healthcare CC0 (240+ papers 2023-2026). 6 MCP servers: mcp-fhir, clinicaltrial-mcp, pubmed-mcp, icd-mcp, nihreporter-mcp, openfdamcp. Repos: MONAI Apache-2.0 8.4k★ (v1.6.0 jun2026, PyTorch medical imaging), awesome-healthcare 3.9k★, Medplum Apache-2.0 2.5k★ (FHIR-native dev platform), OpenEMR GPL 2.4k★, HAPI FHIR Apache-2.0 2.1k★, MedLLMsPracticalGuide MIT 2k★, OpenMRS MPL 1.9k★, scispacy MIT 1.6k★, PyHealth MIT 1.6k★ (MIMIC-III/IV/eICU 33+ models). Medical LLMs: MEDITRON-70B EPFL Apache-2.0 (Llama-2 fine-tuned medical guidelines, supera GPT-3.5 en MedQA), BioMistral Apache-2.0 (Mistral multilingual ES/PT ideal LATAM), Med42 Apache-2.0 (Llama-3 70B, supera MedPaLM 2). 12 vertical platforms: OpenMRS, OpenEMR, Medplum, MONAI, OHIF, HAPI FHIR, cTAKES Apache-2.0, medspacy MIT, OpenScribe MIT, GNU Health GPL, Bahmni AGPL, PyHealth MIT. 3 stack diagrams: radiology AI (OHIF+Orthanc+MONAI+MedSAM+LangGraph), ambient documentation (Whisper+medspacy+MEDITRON+Medplum+LangGraph), telemedicina LATAM (GNU Health+medspacy ES/PT+BioMistral+HAPI FHIR+LangGraph). Market: AI Healthcare $50.7B 2026->$505.6B 2033 CAGR 38.9%; LATAM digital health $16B->$66.4B 2033 CAGR 20.05%; 80% hospitales con AI; 1250+ FDA cleared AI devices; tele-healthcare 46.7% revenue LATAM. LATAM: Brasil Law 14.874/24 + ANVISA PCCP rules + ConecteSUS 150M+; Mexico COFEPRIS + nearshoring + 14.1M diabéticos; Colombia 1DOC3 telemedicina 3M+ usuarios; Chile MINSAL EHR Chile open source FHIR R4. 5 gaps: ambient clinical doc PT-BR/ES (no Nuance DAX LATAM), imaging AI for low-complexity centers (MONAI+OHIF+LangGraph), FHIR interop layer LATAM (Medplum+HAPI FHIR), AI triage telemedicina (46.7% revenue gap), clinical AI ANVISA/COFEPRIS compliance kit. 8 trends: ambient doc 100% adoption, multi-agent tumor boards, medical LLMs open source, FHIR R4 universal, FDA/ANVISA/EU AI Act regulation, low-coverage imaging AI LATAM, mental health AI, ARPA-H agentic clinical AI. 6 compose patterns with Python code.
